name: USS John W. Weeks (DD 701)
events: 26 Aug 1944 USS John W. Weeks (Cdr. Robert Alfred Theobald, JR.) departed from New York for shakedown and training of Bermuda.
16 Oct 1944 USS John W. Weeks (Cdr. R.A. Theobald. Jr.) departed from New York bound for Argentia, Newfoundland, Canada.
7 Nov 1944 USS John W. Weeks (Cdr. R.A. Theobald. Jr.) arrived back at New York.
10 Nov 1944 USS John W. Weeks (Cdr. R.A. Theobald. Jr.) departed from New York bound for the Pacific.
17 Nov 1944 USS John W. Weeks (Cdr. R.A. Theobald. Jr.) transits the Panama Canal.
28 Nov 1944 USS John W. Weeks (Cdr. R.A. Theobald. Jr.) arrived at San Francisco, California.
30 Nov 1944 USS John W. Weeks (Cdr. R.A. Theobald. Jr.) departed from San Francisco bound for Pearl Harbor.
5 Dec 1944 USS John W. Weeks (Cdr. R.A. Theobald. Jr.) arrived at Pearl Harbor.
24 Dec 1944 USS John W. Weeks (Cdr. R.A. Theobald. Jr.) arrived at Eniwetok.
27 Dec 1944 USS John W. Weeks (Cdr. R.A. Theobald. Jr.) arrived at Ulithi.
2 Jan 1945 USS John W. Weeks (Cdr. R.A. Theobald. Jr.) departed from Ulithi to participate in the landings at Luzon, Philippines.
28 Jan 1945 USS John W. Weeks (Cdr. R.A. Theobald. Jr.) returns to Ulithi.
10 Feb 1945 USS John W. Weeks (Cdr. R.A. Theobald. Jr.) departed from Ulithi with TF 58.
4 Mar 1945 USS John W. Weeks (Cdr. R.A. Theobald. Jr.) arrived back at Ulithi.
14 Mar 1945 USS John W. Weeks (Cdr. R.A. Theobald. Jr.) departed from Ulithi with TF 58 to participate in the Okinawa landings.
1 Jun 1945 USS John W. Weeks (Cdr. R.A. Theobald. Jr.) arrived at Leyte, Philippines.
1 Jul 1945 USS John W. Weeks (Cdr. Robert Alfred Theobald. Jr.) departed from Leyte, Philippines with TF 38 to operate of the Japanese mainland.

9 Aug 1945 USS John W. Weeks (Cdr. William L Harmon) is damaged by friendly gunfire during an attack by Japanese kamikaze aircraft east of Honshu, Japan in position 35°00'N, 143°00'E. One men is killed and 11 are injured.
8 Sep 1945 USS John W. Weeks (Cdr. William L. Harmon) arrived at Tokyo Bay.
